headings.usage: Page titles, Card headers, KPI values

structure.sidebar: Fixed width (250px), collapsible on mobile. Dark Slate (#0F172A) background for contrast.
structure.header: Sticky top bar, white background, shadow-sm. Contains Search, Notifications, Profile.

grid_system.detail_page: grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-8 (2 cols for main info, 1 col for actions/status)

layout_strategy.spacing: Generous spacing. Use p-6 for cards, gap-6 for grids. Avoid cramped data.

cards.style: bg-white border border-slate-200 shadow-sm rounded-xl hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200

tables.style: Clean rows, border-b border-slate-100. Header text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-slate-500 font-semibold.
tables.features: Pagination, Search, Filter (Stock Status), Row Actions (Edit/Delete)

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-sm rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-slate-200 text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium
buttons.destructive: bg-red-600 text-white hover:bg-red-700 rounded-lg px-4 py-2

badges.style: rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wide
badges.usage: Stock Aging, Job Status, Payment Status

inputs.style: border-slate-200 focus:border-primary focus:ring-primary rounded-lg h-10 px-3 text-sm

images.description: Mechanic repairing motorcycle in garage. Use with dark overlay for Login page.
Modern showroom bike. Use for 'Add Vehicle' or empty states.
Business handshake. Use for Partner/Financial section headers.

visual_assets.icons: Lucide React (already installed). Use distinct icons for Sidebar: LayoutDashboard (Dashboard), Bike (Inventory), Wrench (Job Cards), Users (Customers), Briefcase (Partners), FileText (Reports), Settings.

special_features.festival_mode: Toggle in Settings. Adds 'Happy Dashain/Tihar' banner and changes primary accent color to Red/Gold.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text is slate-900 on white backgrounds. Status badges must have dark enough text on light bg.
accessibility.interactive: Focus rings on all inputs/buttons. data-testid attributes mandatory.

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for backgrounds. Keep it flat and clean.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
All interactive elements MUST include `data-testid` attribute.
instructions_to_main_agent: Start by setting up the Sidebar Layout. Then build the Dashboard with KPI cards using the color coding for stock aging. Prioritize the Vehicle List view as it's the core operation. Ensure the Job Card flow is intuitive (Status: Pending -> In Progress -> Completed).
